Redirect user to this URL to complete this application."}},"title":"FinancingRedirectUrl"}},"title":"FinancingWorkflowStep"}}},"title":"FinancingV3Application"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"}}}
>
